mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency falls below 45% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions and recession risk, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in greater than 65% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in consumer price inflation and deceleration in retail sales indicates stagflationary pressure that forces monetary tightening while suppressing corporate margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields positive 60d returns in greater than 60% of cases or interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, which generates positive short-term S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days during post-shock recovery phases.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in greater than 55% of expansion months within the specified regime.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth directly increases corporate earnings expectations and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency falls below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels exceeding 280 signal entrenched inflation that forces aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 20d returns in greater than 60% of months where CPIAUCSL breaches the 280 threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirm robust labor market expansion that supports consumer spending and corporate revenue, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 20d returns in greater than 55% of occurrences or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Surges in housing starts indicate peak construction activity and heightened interest rate sensitivity, which precedes monetary tightening and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days during late-cycle expansion phases.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of high housing start months within the late-cycle regime.
